text: A photograph of a narrow, paved street corner in an urban area, likely India. The street curves to the left. On the right, a building features a prominent orange and blue awning with the letters 'FL' and some text in Hindi/Urdu. A small tree is planted in a raised bed surrounded by a blue metal railing. Two people are sitting near the tree. On the left, a white building has a red sign with white text (partially visible, possibly 'मन'). The scene is brightly lit by the sun, casting shadows.
